examples: The man had the effrontery to be sarcastic.
'There's no need to be sarcastic,' she said.
Before I could say anything further, the principal gave me a sly, almost sarcastic smile.
If you listen, beneath the pleasant acoustic instruments, you hear a tartly sarcastic, gravely judgmental song.
Those are the same excuses and sarcastic comments made about Good Old Boys in business.
